MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Vincent Alvarenga.
Attorney Francisco Torres appearing for plaintiff.
Defendants Juana Ramirez and Mario Ramirez are present.
Attorney Laura Chiera represented the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Andrian Colley litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of June 24, 2013 remains on calendar.(501/JPT)
